Highlight: You do not rise to the level of your goals. You fall to the level of your systems.
Every action you take is a vote for the type of person you wish to become.
The most practical way to change who you are is to change what you do.
Habits are the compound interest of self-improvement.
The confidence that individuals have in their beliefs depends mostly on the quality of the story they can tell about what they see.
Nothing in life is as important as you think it is while you are thinking about it.
Intelligence is not only the ability to reason; it is also the ability to find relevant material in memory.
